# Blaze Pollard

> Designer, Software & Agents

## About

Blaze Pollard is a designer focused on apps, AI agents, and interactive 3D experiences with a focus on systems thinking, component architecture, and thoughtful interaction design.

## Links

- Website: https://blaze.design
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/blazepollard/
- X: https://x.com/0xblz

## Projects

- Wind Vector (https://windvector.app) — Creator, 2026. Real-time 3D wind patterns with live forecast data, flight levels, and storm simulations.
- UNO (https://world.org/ecosystem/app_a4f7f3e62c1de0b9490a5260cb390b56) — Designed for PartyDAO, 2026.
- How's the Roads? (https://apps.apple.com/us/app/hows-the-roads/id6742173400) — Creator, 2025. Live traffic cameras, road conditions, and weather for iOS.
- 3D Viewer (https://3d.blaze.design/) — Creator, 2025. Browser-based 3D model viewer.
